creator: never@nevermind.kiev.ua
text:
ports/net/mtr cannot be built with now current default options - without IPV6 support.

Fix: 

Apply patch from upstream:

https://github.com/traviscross/mtr/commit/f3f146f4ae9312b9a4d00b1e2eec504b6d7315e6
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports
	svn up
	rm /var/db/ports/mtr/options
	cd /usr/ports/net/mtr
	make
